allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).items\(\)\)[:5] if 'exports' in d else d.get\('main',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['main','module','exports'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
